core_mechanism: variational low-rank factorization of an exponentially large object into a trace-closed (periodic) chain-product of small matrices — a matrix-product / tensor-train decomposition — whose factors are found by extremizing a quadratic form, with the long chain-product re-factorized to lower the cost scaling in the bond dimension
brief_reason: The abstract represents the ground state as Matrix Product States (a periodic chain of dimension-m matrices) and introduces a factorization of the long products of these matrices that cuts the computational cost from m^5 to m^3, which is exactly a variational low-rank tensor-train factorization with an improved contraction scheme.
